title: rutidea hirsuta
intro: Rutidea hirsuta, also known as the hairy rutidea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Rutidea hirsuta has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Rutidea hirsuta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
